_comment: Mutation testing config. Run manually with: npx stryker run. Weekly via .github/workflows/mutation.yml.
_mutate_comment: Mutates BOTH _helpers.ts (real helper code) AND pure-helpers.test.ts (which contained the original inline copies). The Stryker vitest-runner has trouble resolving relative imports inside its sandbox when only a non-test .ts file is mutated; including the test file too lets the runner find tests. v0.7.6 baseline 38.57% was on test-file-only; mutation report regenerates per run.
